title: Comparison of EVA roars
wikitext:
[]: Comparison of EVA roars             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Mon Dec 21, 2015 10:33 am Care to share your thoughts of any of these? https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kNdq9h6tZ64

[]: Re: Comparison of EVA roars             Quote Post by Glor » Mon Dec 21, 2015 12:31 pm Honestly, love all of the roars from the TV series. The ones from Death are okay, though suffer some unnecessary changes that just make them sound silly. I also remember watching Rebuild and being kind of disappointed: the Evas open their mouths and instead of a screaming, mechanized-ish howl we get a low, underwhelming growl. With exception to 3.33.

[]: Re: Comparison of EVA roars             Quote Post by Compiling_Autumn » Tue Dec 22, 2015 12:12 pm Is there any truth to the rumor that some, if not all of the roars in the original were the pitch-shifted voice of Yui Ikari's voice actress? I want to believe

[]: Re: Comparison of EVA roars             Quote Post by amitakartok » Tue Dec 22, 2015 1:57 pm That's what I heard too.

[]: Re: Comparison of EVA roars             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Dec 23, 2015 3:53 am Compiling_Autumn wrote: Is there any truth to the rumor that some, if not all of the roars in the original were the pitch-shifted voice of Yui Ikari's voice actress? I want to believe

[]: Re: Comparison of EVA roars             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Dec 23, 2015 2:44 pm Someone made a video with Unit 01's voice pitched up if you want to compare. It's pretty eerie. I wonder what the Rebuild Unit 01 sounds like when you edit its voice this way?

[]: Re: Comparison of EVA roars             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Dec 24, 2015 6:45 am The beginning of episode 20 would be good for messing around, since its "Last Time On Eva..." bit at the start has some of the same or similar Eva-01 vocalizations, just without the background music. Also curious for someone to do similar work with Eva-03 and Eva-02, see if those sound like anyone we know... No, I'm not doing it. My computer is poopy.

[]: Re: Comparison of EVA roars             Quote Post by Rei IV » Thu Dec 24, 2015 1:14 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: Someone made a video with Unit 01's voice pitched up if you want to compare. It's pretty eerie. I wonder what the Rebuild Unit 01 sounds like when you edit its voice this way?
